title: Fix C 64-bit MIC LLSec encoding
description: C frame serialization currently ORs the full MIC mask for 64-bit MICs, producing reserved LLSec bits and frames rejected by parsers. Encode the MIC-length enum value correctly and add a valid 64-bit write/parse round-trip test.
close_reason: Fixed 64-bit MIC LLSec enum encoding and added passing write/parse round-trip test
